fields.name: Contact No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of the contact for the alternative address. This field is not editable.
When you create an alternative address from the contact card, the program automatically copies the contact number from the No. field on the contact card.

fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the alternate address.

fields.name: Company Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the company for the alternate address.

fields.name: Company Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies the additional part of the company name for the alternate address.

fields.name: Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the alternate address of the contact.

fields.name: Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional address information.

fields.name: City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the contact's alternate address.

fields.name: Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code.

fields.name: County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the county for the contact's alternate address.

fields.name: Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region of the address.

fields.name: Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the telephone number for the alternate address.

fields.name: Telex No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the telex number for the alternate address.

fields.name: Extension No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the extension number for the contact at the alternative address.

fields.name: Mobile Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the mobile phone number for the alternate address.

fields.name: Pager
fields.tooltip: Specifies the pager number for the contact at the alternate address.

fields.name: E-Mail
fields.tooltip: Specifies the e-mail address for the contact at the alternate address.

fields.name: Home Page
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact's web site.

fields.name: Fax No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the fax number for the alternate address.

fields.name: Telex Answer Back
fields.tooltip: Specifies the telex answer back number for the alternate address.

fields.name: Last Date Modified
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date when the contact alternative address card was last modified. This field is not editable.
When you change information on the contact alternative address card, the program automatically updates the Last Date Modified field to show the current work date.

fields.name: Search E-Mail
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact's e-mail address in upper case. The field is filled out automatically and is only used internally by the program.
